creator: pij@rambler.ru
text:
After yesterday upgrading ports tree php5-(or/and possibly apache22) related ports won't build. Errors shown below:

# portmaster mod_php5

===>>> Currently installed version: mod_php5-5.4.31,1
===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/www/mod_php5

"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.apache.mk", line 333: Malformed conditional (defined (_APACHE_VERSION) && ${_APACHE_VERSION} == 22")

"/usr/ports/www/mod_php5/../../lang/php5/Makefile", line 209: if-less endif
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.php.mk", line 197: warning: duplicate script for target "do-install" ignored
